requirement_topic.en: Hazardous-Substance Restriction — No Horizontal RoHS Equivalent in Oman
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质限制——阿曼无横向 RoHS 等效要求
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質限制——阿曼無橫向 RoHS 等效要求

summary.en: Oman does not operate a horizontal RoHS-type regulation that broadly restricts a fixed list of hazardous substances (lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, phthalates) in electrical and electronic equipment as a condition of market access, in the way the EU RoHS Directive does. There is no GSO-adopted, Oman-enforced equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU acting as a standalone substance-restriction market gate for LED luminaires as of 2026. Substance-related safety is addressed indirectly through the GSO-adopted product safety standards (e.g. material, insulation and component requirements under GSO IEC 60598 / 62560) and any specific chemical / hazardous-material controls under general Omani environmental and chemicals law, rather than through a dedicated electronics RoHS regime. Exporters should not assume a positive RoHS market-access requirement, but should also not assume the absence of any substance control — verify current MOCIIP / DGSM requirements at the time of placement.
summary.zh: 阿曼不存在像欧盟 RoHS 指令那样、作为市场准入条件广泛限制电气电子设备中固定有害物质清单（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE、邻苯二甲酸酯）的横向 RoHS 类法规。截至 2026 年，阿曼没有由 GSO 采纳、在阿曼执行、作为独立物质限制市场门槛、等效于欧盟指令 2011/65/EU 的 LED 灯具规定。与物质相关的安全通过 GSO 采纳的产品安全标准间接处理（如 GSO IEC 60598 / 62560 下的材料、绝缘及元件要求），以及阿曼一般环境与化学品法律下的任何特定化学/危险物质管控，而非通过专门的电子 RoHS 制度。出口商不应假定存在肯定的 RoHS 市场准入要求，但也不应假定完全没有任何物质管控——请在上市时核查现行 MOCIIP / DGSM 要求。
summary.zht: 阿曼不存在像歐盟 RoHS 指令那樣、作為市場准入條件廣泛限制電氣電子設備中固定有害物質清單（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE、鄰苯二甲酸酯）的橫向 RoHS 類法規。截至 2026 年，阿曼沒有由 GSO 採納、在阿曼執行、作為獨立物質限制市場門檻、等效於歐盟指令 2011/65/EU 的 LED 燈具規定。與物質相關的安全透過 GSO 採納的產品安全標準間接處理（如 GSO IEC 60598 / 62560 下的材料、絕緣及元件要求），以及阿曼一般環境與化學品法律下的任何特定化學/危險物質管控，而非透過專門的電子 RoHS 制度。出口商不應假定存在肯定的 RoHS 市場准入要求，但也不應假定完全沒有任何物質管控——請在上市時核查現行 MOCIIP / DGSM 要求。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal RoHS-type substance-restriction regulation adopted as a market-access gate for EEE in Oman as of 2026 (verify current MOCIIP / DGSM position)
Substance-related material / insulation safety addressed indirectly via GSO-adopted product safety standards (GSO IEC 60598 / 62560)

summary.en: China's baseline is GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products), covering the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) at the same concentration thresholds as EU RoHS. China RoHS 2 (Management Measures, with SJ/T 11364-2014) requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange for above threshold / green for below) on EEE sold in China. As of 2026, the 4 EU phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) are not yet in the CN mandatory restricted list under GB/T 26572.
summary.zh: 中国基线为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），浓度限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同。中国 RoHS 2（管理办法，配 SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（超限为橙色/低于限值为绿色）。截至 2026 年，欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）尚未纳入中国 GB/T 26572 强制限制清单。
summary.zht: 中國基線為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），濃度限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同。中國 RoHS 2（管理辦法，配 SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（超限為橙色/低於限值為綠色）。截至 2026 年，歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）尚未納入中國 GB/T 26572 強制限制清單。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in EEE (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: Unlike the EU, Oman has no horizontal RoHS market gate, so there is generally no positive obligation to test LED luminaires against the EU 10-substance RoHS list (or the China 6-substance GB/T 26572 list) purely for Oman market access. This is a lighter substance-restriction burden than EU export. However: (1) the China RoHS disclosure label (orange / green) has no role in Oman and should not be relied on as an Oman compliance artifact; (2) material and component safety is still governed by the GSO-adopted lighting safety standards; (3) if the same product is also destined for the EU, EU RoHS (including the 4 phthalates) and REACH SVHC obligations still apply for those EU shipments. Exporters should confirm the current MOCIIP / DGSM position before assuming no substance control exists, as GCC / GSO requirements can evolve.
gap.zh: 与欧盟不同，阿曼没有横向 RoHS 市场门槛，故通常不存在仅为阿曼市场准入而对 LED 灯具按欧盟 10 项 RoHS 清单（或中国 6 项 GB/T 26572 清单）进行检测的肯定性义务。这比对欧盟出口的物质限制负担更轻。但是：（1）中国 RoHS 披露标识（橙/绿）在阿曼无作用，不应作为阿曼合规凭证依赖；（2）材料与元件安全仍由 GSO 采纳的照明安全标准管辖；（3）若同一产品同时面向欧盟，则对该等欧盟批次仍适用欧盟 RoHS（含 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯）及 REACH SVHC 义务。出口商在假定不存在任何物质管控前，应确认现行 MOCIIP / DGSM 立场，因 GCC / GSO 要求可能演变。
gap.zht: 與歐盟不同，阿曼沒有橫向 RoHS 市場門檻，故通常不存在僅為阿曼市場准入而對 LED 燈具按歐盟 10 項 RoHS 清單（或中國 6 項 GB/T 26572 清單）進行檢測的肯定性義務。這比對歐盟出口的物質限制負擔更輕。但是：（1）中國 RoHS 披露標識（橙/綠）在阿曼無作用，不應作為阿曼合規憑證依賴；（2）材料與元件安全仍由 GSO 採納的照明安全標準管轄；（3）若同一產品同時面向歐盟，則對該等歐盟批次仍適用歐盟 RoHS（含 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯）及 REACH SVHC 義務。出口商在假定不存在任何物質管控前，應確認現行 MOCIIP / DGSM 立場，因 GCC / GSO 要求可能演變。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — no horizontal RoHS-type substance-restriction market gate for EEE in Oman as of 2026; material safety addressed indirectly via GSO-adopted product safety standards (verify current MOCIIP / DGSM position)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 phthalates not yet in CN mandatory list as of 2026

source.publisher: MOCIIP — Directorate General for Standards and Metrology (DGSM), Sultanate of Oman

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Oman has no horizontal RoHS-type substance-restriction regime acting as a market gate for LED luminaires as of 2026, so the EU 10-substance and CN 6-substance lists are not a positive Oman market-access test. Substance / material safety is addressed indirectly through GSO-adopted lighting safety standards. The China RoHS disclosure label has no Oman standing. Exporters serving both Oman and the EU must still meet EU RoHS and REACH for EU shipments. Confirm the current MOCIIP / DGSM position, as GSO requirements can change.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至 2026 年，阿曼无作为 LED 灯具市场门槛的横向 RoHS 类物质限制制度，故欧盟 10 项与中国 6 项清单不构成阿曼市场准入的肯定性检测。物质/材料安全通过 GSO 采纳的照明安全标准间接处理。中国 RoHS 披露标识在阿曼无效力。同时服务阿曼与欧盟的出口商，对欧盟批次仍须满足欧盟 RoHS 与 REACH。请确认现行 MOCIIP / DGSM 立场，因 GSO 要求可能变化。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至 2026 年，阿曼無作為 LED 燈具市場門檻的橫向 RoHS 類物質限制制度，故歐盟 10 項與中國 6 項清單不構成阿曼市場准入的肯定性檢測。物質/材料安全透過 GSO 採納的照明安全標準間接處理。中國 RoHS 披露標識在阿曼無效力。同時服務阿曼與歐盟的出口商，對歐盟批次仍須滿足歐盟 RoHS 與 REACH。請確認現行 MOCIIP / DGSM 立場，因 GSO 要求可能變化。

requirement_topic.en: Conformity Assessment, Product Registration and In-Country Importer (MOCIIP / DGSM)
requirement_topic.zh: 合格评定、产品注册与在地进口商（MOCIIP / DGSM）
requirement_topic.zht: 合格評定、產品註冊與在地進口商（MOCIIP / DGSM）

summary.en: Market access for regulated LED luminaires in Oman runs through MOCIIP / DGSM conformity assessment and product registration, generally requiring: (1) test reports demonstrating compliance with the GSO-adopted safety, performance, EMC and (where applicable) energy-efficiency standards; (2) a conformity certificate / registration from a DGSM-recognized conformity assessment body or scheme; (3) an in-country registered importer / agent acting as the responsible entity for placement; and (4) compliant marking, labelling and the GSO energy-efficiency label where in scope. Goods typically enter via the ports of Sohar or Salalah and may be subject to conformity verification at import. The legal basis is the MOCIIP / DGSM technical regulations adopting the relevant GSO standards. Self-declaration alone (as used for some EU CE routes) is not the Oman pathway; recognized conformity-body involvement and importer registration are generally required.
summary.zh: 阿曼受管制 LED 灯具的市场准入经由 MOCIIP / DGSM 合格评定与产品注册，通常要求：（1）证明符合 GSO 采纳的安全、性能、EMC 及（适用时）能效标准的检测报告；（2）来自 DGSM 认可的合格评定机构或方案的合格证书/注册；（3）作为上市责任主体的在地注册进口商/代理；以及（4）符合要求的标识、标签及在适用范围内的 GSO 能效标签。货物通常经苏哈尔（Sohar）或塞拉莱（Salalah）港口入境，并可能在进口时接受合格验证。法律依据为采纳相关 GSO 标准的 MOCIIP / DGSM 技术法规。仅自我声明（如部分欧盟 CE 路径所用）不是阿曼路径；通常须有认可合格评定机构参与及进口商注册。
summary.zht: 阿曼受管制 LED 燈具的市場准入經由 MOCIIP / DGSM 合格評定與產品註冊，通常要求：（1）證明符合 GSO 採納的安全、性能、EMC 及（適用時）能效標準的檢測報告；（2）來自 DGSM 認可的合格評定機構或方案的合格證書/註冊；（3）作為上市責任主體的在地註冊進口商/代理；以及（4）符合要求的標識、標籤及在適用範圍內的 GSO 能效標籤。貨物通常經蘇哈爾（Sohar）或塞拉萊（Salalah）港口入境，並可能在進口時接受合格驗證。法律依據為採納相關 GSO 標準的 MOCIIP / DGSM 技術法規。僅自我聲明（如部分歐盟 CE 路徑所用）不是阿曼路徑；通常須有認可合格評定機構參與及進口商註冊。

standards_or_laws: MOCIIP / DGSM conformity assessment and product registration requirements for regulated products (adopting relevant GSO standards)
In-country registered importer / agent requirement; conformity verification at import (ports of Sohar / Salalah)

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for in-scope luminaires sold in the residential market is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA, requiring third-party certification by a CNCA-authorized body (e.g. CQC). Products outside mandatory CCC scope may use voluntary CQC certification. For wireless luminaires, SRRC type approval is additionally required. CCC / CQC certificates are issued under the Chinese national scheme and are not recognized for the Oman DGSM / GSO conformity pathway.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向居民市场销售的适用范围内灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，须由 CNCA 授权机构（如 CQC）进行第三方认证。非强制 CCC 范畴的产品可采用自愿性 CQC 认证。对于无线灯具，还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。CCC / CQC 证书在中国国家制度下签发，不被阿曼 DGSM / GSO 合格评定路径所认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向居民市場銷售的適用範圍內燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，須由 CNCA 授權機構（如 CQC）進行第三方認證。非強制 CCC 範疇的產品可採用自願性 CQC 認證。對於無線燈具，還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。CCC / CQC 證書在中國國家制度下簽發，不被阿曼 DGSM / GSO 合格評定路徑所認可。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA / CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: China's CCC / CQC certification and the Oman DGSM / GSO conformity scheme are parallel and non-mutual: a CCC certificate does not grant Oman market access. Key Oman-specific steps with no direct CN counterpart: (1) registration / conformity through a DGSM-recognized conformity body using GSO-adopted standards; (2) an in-country registered importer / agent as the responsible entity (China has no equivalent foreign-manufacturer-must-appoint-local-importer step within its own domestic CCC); (3) conformity verification at the port of import (Sohar / Salalah); (4) the GSO energy-efficiency label and Arabic / English labelling. Test reports from ILAC MRA-recognized (CNAS) laboratories built on IEC-aligned GB standards can substantially support the GSO submission, reducing duplicate testing, but the certification and importer-registration administration must be completed under the Oman scheme.
gap.zh: 中国 CCC / CQC 认证与阿曼 DGSM / GSO 合格评定制度并行且不互认：CCC 证书不授予阿曼市场准入。主要阿曼特有步骤（无直接中国对应）：（1）经 DGSM 认可的合格评定机构按 GSO 采纳标准进行注册/合格评定；（2）以在地注册进口商/代理作为责任主体（中国国内 CCC 制度内并无等效的「外国制造商须指定本地进口商」步骤）；（3）在进口港口（苏哈尔/塞拉莱）进行合格验证；（4）GSO 能效标签及阿拉伯语/英语标签。来自 ILAC MRA 认可（CNAS）实验室、基于 IEC 对齐 GB 标准的检测报告可大幅支持 GSO 提交，减少重复测试，但认证与进口商注册行政程序须在阿曼制度下完成。
gap.zht: 中國 CCC / CQC 認證與阿曼 DGSM / GSO 合格評定制度並行且不互認：CCC 證書不授予阿曼市場准入。主要阿曼特有步驟（無直接中國對應）：（1）經 DGSM 認可的合格評定機構按 GSO 採納標準進行註冊/合格評定；（2）以在地註冊進口商/代理作為責任主體（中國國內 CCC 制度內並無等效的「外國製造商須指定本地進口商」步驟）；（3）在進口港口（蘇哈爾/塞拉萊）進行合格驗證；（4）GSO 能效標籤及阿拉伯語/英語標籤。來自 ILAC MRA 認可（CNAS）實驗室、基於 IEC 對齊 GB 標準的檢測報告可大幅支持 GSO 提交，減少重複測試，但認證與進口商註冊行政程序須在阿曼制度下完成。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DGSM / GSO conformity assessment, product registration via a recognized conformity body, and an in-country registered importer required before Oman market placement; conformity verification may apply at import
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless luminaires

source.publisher: MOCIIP — Directorate General for Standards and Metrology (DGSM), Sultanate of Oman

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Oman market access for regulated LED luminaires requires DGSM / GSO conformity assessment, product registration via a recognized conformity body, and an in-country registered importer, with possible conformity verification at the ports of Sohar / Salalah. China's CCC / CQC and SRRC are parallel non-mutual schemes that do not grant Oman access. ILAC MRA-recognized CN test reports on IEC-aligned GB standards can support the GSO submission and reduce duplicate testing, but the Oman certification and importer-registration administration must be completed separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿曼受管制 LED 灯具的市场准入须经 DGSM / GSO 合格评定、经认可合格评定机构进行产品注册，以及在地注册进口商，并可能在苏哈尔/塞拉莱港口进行合格验证。中国 CCC / CQC 与 SRRC 为并行的非互认制度，不授予阿曼准入。来自 ILAC MRA 认可、基于 IEC 对齐 GB 标准的中国检测报告可支持 GSO 提交并减少重复测试，但阿曼认证与进口商注册行政程序须单独完成。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿曼受管制 LED 燈具的市場准入須經 DGSM / GSO 合格評定、經認可合格評定機構進行產品註冊，以及在地註冊進口商，並可能在蘇哈爾/塞拉萊港口進行合格驗證。中國 CCC / CQC 與 SRRC 為並行的非互認制度，不授予阿曼准入。來自 ILAC MRA 認可、基於 IEC 對齊 GB 標準的中國檢測報告可支持 GSO 提交並減少重複測試，但阿曼認證與進口商註冊行政程序須單獨完成。

requirement_topic.en: Chemicals / Hazardous-Material Controls vs REACH SVHC and CN Chemical Law
requirement_topic.zh: 化学品/危险物质管控 vs REACH SVHC 与中国化学品法
requirement_topic.zht: 化學品/危險物質管控 vs REACH SVHC 與中國化學品法

summary.en: Oman does not operate a REACH-style supply-chain notification obligation (such as EU REACH Article 33 SVHC communication, or a biannually updated Candidate List) for articles such as LED luminaires as a condition of market access. General chemical and hazardous-material handling in Oman is governed by national environmental and chemical-safety law and applicable GSO chemical / labelling standards, focused mainly on hazardous chemicals, transport and workplace safety rather than on substance-in-article notification for finished electronics. For LED luminaires, there is therefore generally no ongoing SVHC screening / B2B notification duty equivalent to REACH Article 33 for the Oman market. Exporters should still verify any product-specific restrictions (e.g. mercury content in any lamp types) under the relevant GSO and Omani provisions before placement.
summary.zh: 阿曼不存在像欧盟 REACH 第 33 条 SVHC 通报、或每半年更新候选清单那样的、作为市场准入条件、针对 LED 灯具等物品的 REACH 式供应链通报义务。阿曼一般化学品与危险物质处理由国家环境与化学安全法及适用的 GSO 化学/标签标准管辖，主要侧重危险化学品、运输及工作场所安全，而非针对成品电子产品的物品中物质通报。因此对于 LED 灯具，阿曼市场通常不存在等效于 REACH 第 33 条的持续性 SVHC 筛查/B2B 通报义务。出口商在上市前仍应核查相关 GSO 及阿曼条款下任何产品特定限制（如任何灯型中的汞含量）。
summary.zht: 阿曼不存在像歐盟 REACH 第 33 條 SVHC 通報、或每半年更新候選清單那樣的、作為市場准入條件、針對 LED 燈具等物品的 REACH 式供應鏈通報義務。阿曼一般化學品與危險物質處理由國家環境與化學安全法及適用的 GSO 化學/標籤標準管轄，主要側重危險化學品、運輸及工作場所安全，而非針對成品電子產品的物品中物質通報。因此對於 LED 燈具，阿曼市場通常不存在等效於 REACH 第 33 條的持續性 SVHC 篩查/B2B 通報義務。出口商在上市前仍應核查相關 GSO 及阿曼條款下任何產品特定限制（如任何燈型中的汞含量）。

standards_or_laws: No REACH-style SVHC supply-chain notification obligation for articles in Oman as of 2026 (verify current MOCIIP / DGSM and environmental-authority position)
General Omani environmental / chemical-safety law and GSO chemical / hazard labelling standards (hazardous chemicals, transport, workplace safety focus)

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to REACH SVHC Article 33 supply-chain notification either. The closest CN instruments are MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances — and GB 30981 / GB-series hazardous-chemical classification and labelling rules. None create an obligation to proactively notify B2B customers when an SVHC is present in an article above 0.1% w/w.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH SVHC 第 33 条供应链通报的制度。最接近的中国工具为生态环境部令第 12 号（2020 年）——《新化学物质环境管理登记办法》——及 GB 30981 / GB 系列危险化学品分类和标签规则。上述均未产生在物品中 SVHC 浓度超过 0.1%（质量分数）时主动通报 B2B 客户的义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH SVHC 第 33 條供應鏈通報的制度。最接近的中國工具為生態環境部令第 12 號（2020 年）——《新化學物質環境管理登記辦法》——及 GB 30981 / GB 系列危險化學品分類和標籤規則。上述均未產生在物品中 SVHC 濃度超過 0.1%（質量分數）時主動通報 B2B 客戶的義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981 / GB-series — classification and labelling of hazardous chemicals (China)

gap.en: For the Oman market specifically, neither an EU-style REACH SVHC Article 33 notification duty nor a SCIP-type database registration applies to LED luminaires, so this is a lighter ongoing-compliance burden than EU export — and broadly comparable to China, which also lacks a REACH Article 33 equivalent. The practical points: (1) exporters serving both Oman and the EU must still maintain REACH SVHC screening and Candidate List tracking for their EU shipments, even though Oman does not require it; (2) any product-specific GSO or Omani provision (for example mercury limits applicable to certain lamp technologies, or hazardous-chemical labelling where relevant) should still be checked; (3) do not rely on the absence of a REACH-style duty as a permanent assumption — GCC / GSO chemical requirements can evolve, so re-verify the current MOCIIP / DGSM and environmental-authority position at the time of placement.
gap.zh: 就阿曼市场而言，LED 灯具既不适用欧盟式 REACH SVHC 第 33 条通报义务，也不适用 SCIP 类数据库注册，故其持续性合规负担轻于欧盟出口——并与同样缺乏 REACH 第 33 条等效制度的中国大致相当。实务要点：（1）同时服务阿曼与欧盟的出口商，即便阿曼不要求，对其欧盟批次仍须维持 REACH SVHC 筛查及候选清单跟踪；（2）仍应核查任何产品特定的 GSO 或阿曼条款（如适用于某些灯技术的汞限值，或相关危险化学品标签）；（3）不应将「无 REACH 式义务」作为永久假定——GCC / GSO 化学要求可能演变，故应在上市时重新核查现行 MOCIIP / DGSM 及环境主管部门立场。
gap.zht: 就阿曼市場而言，LED 燈具既不適用歐盟式 REACH SVHC 第 33 條通報義務，也不適用 SCIP 類數據庫註冊，故其持續性合規負擔輕於歐盟出口——並與同樣缺乏 REACH 第 33 條等效制度的中國大致相當。實務要點：（1）同時服務阿曼與歐盟的出口商，即便阿曼不要求，對其歐盟批次仍須維持 REACH SVHC 篩查及候選清單跟蹤；（2）仍應核查任何產品特定的 GSO 或阿曼條款（如適用於某些燈技術的汞限值，或相關危險化學品標籤）；（3）不應將「無 REACH 式義務」作為永久假定——GCC / GSO 化學要求可能演變，故應在上市時重新核查現行 MOCIIP / DGSM 及環境主管部門立場。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — no REACH-style SVHC supply-chain notification or SCIP-type registration for LED luminaires in Oman as of 2026; general chemical-safety law applies (verify current position)
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — no supply-chain SVHC notification obligation equivalent to REACH Article 33 in China as of 2026

source.publisher: MOCIIP — Directorate General for Standards and Metrology (DGSM), Sultanate of Oman

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Oman does not impose a REACH-style SVHC Article 33 notification duty or SCIP-type registration on LED luminaires as of 2026, so the ongoing chemical-notification burden is lighter than EU export and broadly comparable to China. Exporters serving the EU as well must still maintain REACH SVHC screening for EU shipments. Check any product-specific GSO / Omani chemical provisions (e.g. mercury limits for certain lamp types) and re-verify the current MOCIIP / DGSM and environmental-authority position before placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至 2026 年，阿曼未对 LED 灯具施加 REACH 式 SVHC 第 33 条通报义务或 SCIP 类注册，故持续性化学通报负担轻于欧盟出口，并与中国大致相当。同时服务欧盟的出口商，对欧盟批次仍须维持 REACH SVHC 筛查。请核查任何产品特定的 GSO / 阿曼化学条款（如某些灯型的汞限值），并在上市前重新核查现行 MOCIIP / DGSM 及环境主管部门立场。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至 2026 年，阿曼未對 LED 燈具施加 REACH 式 SVHC 第 33 條通報義務或 SCIP 類註冊，故持續性化學通報負擔輕於歐盟出口，並與中國大致相當。同時服務歐盟的出口商，對歐盟批次仍須維持 REACH SVHC 篩查。請核查任何產品特定的 GSO / 阿曼化學條款（如某些燈型的汞限值），並在上市前重新核查現行 MOCIIP / DGSM 及環境主管部門立場。
